# Getting Started on Mobile

👋 Welcome to Notion!

Here are the basics:

- [x]  Tap anywhere and start typing
- [x]  Tap the + above your keyboard to add content — headers, sub pages, etc.
    
    [Example sub page](https://www.notion.so/Example-sub-page-11050d63579340aea62f894f66a5a0ff?pvs=21)
    
- [x]  Highlight text and use the bar above your keyboard to format
- [x]  Tap and hold this line, then drag
- [x]  Tap the home tab button at the bottom left to see your pages
- [x]  Tap anywhere and select ✨ in the bar above your keyboard to check out **Notion AI**
